title: Tick 20: prove the outcome-reviewer subagent is runnable by dispatching it against open PR opensubagents outcomes-mcp 18
question: Did the outcome-reviewer subagent successfully read PR 18 on opensubagents outcomes-mcp score its outcome+report pair against HeuristicVerifier and post a structured review comment naming the verdict the weakest dimension and a recommendation per the role spec at .claude agents outcome-reviewer md?
success_criteria: Agent tool dispatched the outcome-reviewer subagent against PR 18 and the subagent followed the documented procedure without modifying any repo files
the subagent scored the pair via the python HeuristicVerifier and reported overall 4.4 against floor 3.5
the subagent posted exactly one comment on PR 18 with the role-specified shape header dimensions weakest-dimension recommendation
runroc outcomes runrocs E1-outcome-reviewer json records the posted comment author URL and full body

capabilities: outcome-reviewer subagent dispatchable via the Agent tool from the heartbeat
subagent reads PR pair without modifying the working tree
subagent scores via python HeuristicVerifier and identifies the weakest dimension
subagent posts exactly one structured comment in the documented format
